message:
fix: remove t.Parallel() from graph tests that race on os.Stdout

Tests using captureGraphOutput() redirect the global os.Stdout to a
pipe. When run in parallel, multiple goroutines race to modify this
global variable, causing output to go to the wrong pipe and assertions
to fail. Removing t.Parallel() ensures these tests serialize their
stdout capture.

Fixes: bd-9rqwe

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
